query:
SELECT ticker, MIN(date) as earliest, MAX(date) as latest, COUNT(*) as total_records
FROM historicalPrices 
WHERE ticker IN ('NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'AAPL.US', 'TSM', 'NVDA.US')
GROUP BY ticker;
command:

FROM historicalPrices 
WHERE ticker IN ('NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'AAPL.US', 'TSM', 'NVDA.US')
